words.def: a set of garments (usually including a jacket and trousers or skirt) for outerwear all of the same fabric and color
words.zh: n. 套裝, 訴訟, 請求, 起訴, 套, 組
vi. 坐, 就座, 坐落

words.def: the branch of engineering that deals with the use of computers and telecommunications to retrieve and store and transmit information
